analysis_plan_ref.anchor: §6 (phase-2b conditional host-lift leg) + §5 (statistics), as split out 2026-07-12; §4 decision rules govern the certificate leg under rules-1-knull-cert

arms_mandatory_baselines: kernel x A1 (REUSED, never regenerated): model-alone R1 rows carried VERBATIM from the frozen rules-1 campaign run-records, keyed by run-log row shas (RC-1); the row-hash pins enter pins.artifact_hashes and the reused_from block at the blocking pre-freeze amendment (ASM-1407/1417; review fix 8)
kernel x A3 (REUSED, never regenerated): verify-retry k=4 R1 rows carried verbatim from the frozen rules-1 campaign run-records — same reuse discipline and row-hash pinning

knull x A1 (FRESH GPU): A1 under the k1 knull-plain TBox (tbox-knull dir-digest 15b79bb795ee95d79c6e61bf057d91b2d71f67f89718ce399f62a163ca053c42, fixed by the rules-1-knull-cert record) on the FINALISED rules-1 host-lift harness (PINNED-AT-INPUTS until the parent's ops amendment lands), staged under the attested shadow-substitution discipline (ASM-1413)

knull x A3 (FRESH GPU): A3 verify-retry k=4 under the k1 TBox — same harness and staging discipline; ACTIVATION for the whole campaign machine-checked on the pinned parent rules-1 /analysis/primary_pass == true (ASM-1417); parent-fail or unread => this record is never frozen or run (there is no host lift to ablate)

dependent_vars.definition: phase-2b only: exact match vs the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold (identical scoring to rules-1)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_ext

assumptions.claim: Conditional leg + reuse (ASM-1407): activation machine-checked on the pinned parent rules-1 /analysis/primary_pass true; kernel cells reused verbatim from the frozen rules-1 campaign run-records; only the two knull cells are fresh GPU work; unevaluable => all hostlift fields null, never a fail

Statistical discipline (ASM-1417, review fixes 8/9): EXACTLY 858 paired items x 3 seeds x all four (host_tbox x host_arm) cells (10,296 rows); duplicates/missing/extras/non-binary scores => /analysis/hostlift_rows_valid false, ALL stats null (complete-case dropping is a preregistration violation); Holm within {h1,h2} on one-sided bootstrap p-values (smallest at alpha/2=0.025, the other at 0.05 only if the first rejects) — no unadjusted twin tests

Contamination direction (ASM-1401) rides every NULL sentence here exactly as in the certificate leg: the k1 definition-drafting session had kernel exposure; the pressure is toward the SURVIVES/deflationary branch; a PASS is conservative, a NULL carries the rider

Generation estimate (ASM-1418, load_bearing:false): <=6k generations (858 items x 3 seeds x {A1, A3 k=4} on the two knull cells only; kernel cells reused) inside the <=$4 / 2 GPU-h / 6h-wall caps. EXTRAPOLATION from the rules-1/nsk1 cost data; resolution path: measured wall-clock + generation counts in the registered run's provenance logs; never load-bearing for any verdict

FREEZE-READINESS DEFERRAL (ASM-1419): every GPU-harness pin in this record is a PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder with a named resolution — the runnable harness bytes exist only when the parent rules-1 host-lift harness finalises (its frozen harness_manifest is itself PINNED-AT-INPUTS, completed by the parent's pre-final-run ops amendment). This record must NOT be frozen before the blocking checklist in runner_constraints.freeze_readiness resolves; the absent reused_from block doubles as a mechanical backstop (once the parent's kernel-cell rows are logged, freezing without it refuses fail-closed as a reuse collision)

n_planned.generations_estimate: <=6k generations on the knull cells only (kernel cells reused from the frozen rules-1 campaign) — EXTRAPOLATION ASM-1418, load_bearing:false

endpoints.test: h1 PRIMARY (ASM-1407/1417): knull host lift (A3_knull - A1_knull) on entailed cells vs the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold, paired item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0, B=10000, PRNG seed 20260712, AND Holm-adjusted one-sided bootstrap p within {h1,h2} (smallest p at alpha/2=0.025, the other at 0.05 only if the first rejects — no unadjusted twin tests; review fix 9). Requires EXACTLY 858 paired items x 3 seeds x all four (host_tbox x host_arm) cells (duplicates/missing/extras => /analysis/hostlift_rows_valid false, all stats null). TRUE together with h2 => host-level survival => verdict NULL = host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this one plain-dictionary compilation channel (deflationary branch, equal prominence, contamination rider ASM-1401 verbatim). FALSE with the instrument gates green => verdict PASS = KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION at the host level — scoped to this vertical, this channel, rung R1 only; never 'no generic ruleset can succeed'. h1-pass with h2-fail resolves INCONCLUSIVE (sign survived, equivalence unshown).

h2 (ASM-1417): TOST — 90% BCa CI of (kernel lift - knull lift) inside ±0.05 AND Holm-adjusted TOST bootstrap p within {h1,h2}; same row-exactness, activation and reuse discipline as h1. Host-level survival = h1 AND h2; equivalence alone (h2 without h1) licenses nothing.

ACTIVATION INSTRUMENT gate (ASM-1417): machine-checked from the pinned parent rules-1 analysis output (--parent-analysis): /analysis/primary_pass must be true — if the parent lift did not land there is no host lift to ablate and this record should never have been frozen or run; false/unread => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, licenses NOTHING, leaves the parent claim and the rules-1-knull-cert verdict untouched.

row-exactness INSTRUMENT gate (ASM-1417, review fix 9): exactly 858 x 3 x 4 rows, no duplicates/missing/extras/non-binary scores; complete-case dropping is a preregistration violation; false => all stats null => INSTRUMENT-INVALID.
execution witness: the hostlift rows document was supplied and processed (--hostlift); false => nothing ran => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, nothing licensed.

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: this record measures the SUBSTITUTION SENSITIVITY OF THE HOST LIFT at ONE rung (R1 = SmolLM2-135M-Instruct), ONE vertical (kinship, the RULES-1 closed rule inventory, proof depth <= 4, gold-parse only — no NL-robustness claim, the l3a-parse wall stands), against ONE substitution channel (the k1 plain-dictionary knull TBox, tbox-knull dir-digest 15b79bb795ee95d79c6e61bf057d91b2d71f67f89718ce399f62a163ca053c42, exactly as fixed and measured by the rules-1-knull-cert record). A single rung licenses NO scale language of any kind. NULL licenses exactly: the measured host lift is reproduced (h1 sign + h2 equivalence within ±0.05) by the knull-compiled ruleset at this rung/vertical/channel — host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this channel; the contamination rider (ASM-1401) rides every NULL sentence. PASS licenses exactly: host-level KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION at this rung/vertical/channel; it does NOT license 'no generic ruleset can succeed' (k3 and better compilers are named follow-ons carried by the rules-1-knull-cert record). Kernel cells are reused verbatim from the frozen rules-1 campaign; nothing here amends rules-1 or rules-1-knull-cert — their frozen records, pins and envelopes stand byte-identical, and host-level results can neither strengthen nor weaken the certificate-level verdict.
hypotheses: H-K3 (the question, conditional on the parent; two-sided by construction): with activation machine-checked on the pinned parent rules-1 /analysis/primary_pass == true, the knull-substituted host lift either REPRODUCES the kernel host lift — h1 (knull lift paired-item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0) AND h2 (TOST: 90% BCa CI of kernel-minus-knull lift inside ±0.05), Holm within {h1,h2} — => host-level survival, verdict NULL = host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this one plain-dictionary compilation channel (equal prominence; contamination rider ASM-1401); or FAILS h1 with gates green => verdict PASS = host-level KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION. h1-pass/h2-fail resolves INCONCLUSIVE. No direction is favoured by the record.

FREEZE-READINESS (ASM-1419): this record is NOT freeze-ready. It hard-depends on (i) rules-1 completing its GPU campaign and readout, (ii) the FINALISED rules-1 host-lift harness bytes (the parent's frozen harness_manifest is completed only by its pre-final-run ops amendment), and (iii) the frozen rules-1-knull-cert record (the k1 TBox identity this record consumes). Every GPU-harness pin below is a PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder with a named resolution; the blocking checklist lives in runner_constraints.freeze_readiness and resolves in ONE pre-freeze amendment.
kill_criterion_verbatim: This record carries NO independent kill of the RULES-1 line and NO certificate-level claim; it resolves the HOST-LEVEL wording of the MD-7/PROPOSED-ASM-1138 claim cap, conditional on the parent landing. ACTIVATION: if the pinned parent rules-1 analysis does not carry /analysis/primary_pass true (KILL-b fired, or unread), this record must never be frozen or run — there is no host lift to ablate; a run anyway resolves INSTRUMENT-INVALID and licenses NOTHING. Verdict NULL (h1 AND h2, gates green) fixes the host-level wording to 'host lift reproduced by the measured plain-dictionary compilation channel; host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this channel' — one comparator licenses NO universal any-ruleset claim. Verdict PASS (h1 fails, gates green) = host-level KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION — never 'no generic ruleset can succeed'. h1-pass with h2-fail resolves INCONCLUSIVE (sign survived, equivalence unshown; no survival claim, no advantage claim). INSTRUMENT-INVALID (activation, execution witness, row exactness, attestation/pins) licenses NOTHING and leaves both the rules-1 claim and the rules-1-knull-cert verdict exactly as frozen. Gate failures can never read as PASS, NULL, or INCONCLUSIVE evidence; the deflationary outcome gets EQUAL prominence (the knull discipline verbatim). FREEZE-READINESS KILL: this DRAFT may not freeze until (i) rules-1 is complete with its finalised host-lift harness bytes pinned here by the blocking amendment, (ii) rules-1-knull-cert is FROZEN, and (iii) the reused_from block for the kernel cells is filled from the logged rules-1 rows (RC-1..RC-8) — until then the declared kernel x A1/A3 cells collide with the logged parent rows and prereg-freeze refuses fail-closed.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: PINNED-AT-INPUTS (GPU host-lift; NOT FREEZE-READY): the runnable harness for this record is the FINALISED rules-1 host-lift harness — single A10G via Modal, fp32, greedy/seeded, A1 + A3(k=4) — whose byte-manifest the frozen rules-1 record completes only via its pre-final-run ops amendment (its own harness_manifest is PINNED-AT-INPUTS as frozen). RESOLUTION (one blocking pre-freeze amendment): copy the finalised executable/manifest shas from the parent's ops amendment + run provenance into pins.artifact_hashes here (rules1_runner.py, modal wrapper, rules1-manifest, f2bt verify-retry loop, Modal image requirements), fill the reused_from block with the frozen kernel-cell row shas (RC-1..RC-8), and pin the parent analysis output sha (activation witness). ONLY the two knull cells are fresh GPU work, staging the k1 TBox (tbox-knull 15b79bb7…, fixed and measured by rules-1-knull-cert) under the attested shadow-substitution discipline (ASM-1413/1417). Model revision R1 = HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-135M-Instruct@12fd25f77366fa6b3b4b768ec3050bf629380bac (fp32; FROZEN revision carriers: f2b-replicate + f2b-transfer pins.model_revisions — review fix 1 correction preserved). CPU certificate leg: NONE — registered separately as rules-1-knull-cert. This record is NOT freeze-ready until every PINNED-AT-INPUTS above resolves.

runner_constraints.engine_identity_note: PROPOSED-ASM-1416 (review fix 6): k1/k2 ablation decisions execute ONLY the pinned Python differential twin (poc/rules-1/twin_engine.py 399fcd8d…). The inherited certificate_result.engine_identity text ('BOTH engines … sparq-reason … EXACTLY agreed', commit 0ab87b2a) describes the RULES-1 conformance run over the KERNEL TBox and is FALSE for the substituted arms — sparq-reason is NOT executed over the knull/scrambled TBoxes. The runner stamps this disclosure into every k1/k2 payload (engine_identity_ablation_disclosure); substituted-TBox differential conformance is a NAMED FOLLOW-ON, not part of this record; no reader may cite the inherited text for k1/k2.
runner_constraints.freeze_readiness: BLOCKED — DO NOT FREEZE. Checklist (all BLOCKING, resolved by ONE pre-freeze amendment): (1) rules-1 GPU campaign complete, readout pinned, /analysis/primary_pass witnessed true (activation, ASM-1417; if false this record is retired unrun — nothing to ablate); (2) the parent's ops amendment landed => copy the finalised host-lift harness shas into pins.artifact_hashes (replaces every PINNED-AT-INPUTS); (3) rules-1-knull-cert FROZEN, its frozen_sha256 pinned here (the k1 TBox identity + compilation-fidelity gates this record consumes); (4) reused_from block filled from the logged rules-1 kernel-cell rows (RC-1..RC-8) — until then the declared kernel x A1/A3 cells collide with the logged parent rows and prereg-freeze refuses fail-closed (ERR_P2_REUSE_COLLISION), the intended mechanical backstop; (5) analysis invocation pinned: the current pinned script's /gates/harness_pins_valid validates certificate-leg attestations against --record, so the amendment either supplies the frozen rules-1-knull-cert record as the attestation source for the cert-leg payload gates with hostlift rows attested separately, or re-pins a revised analysis script (path+sha updated); this record's verdict_rules deliberately read ONLY hostlift output fields so either resolution leaves them valid; (6) re-verify analysis_plan_ref/prereg_doc shas at amendment time.
runner_constraints.hardware: single A10G via Modal (fp32, greedy/seeded) — ONLY the two knull cells are fresh GPU work; kernel cells reused verbatim; NOTHING runs before freeze, and freeze is BLOCKED until rules-1 completes (see freeze_readiness)
runner_constraints.harness: the FINALISED rules-1 host-lift harness (PINNED-AT-INPUTS, see pins.harness_manifest); Modal hygiene per the frozen rules-1 record: launch long runs nohup+setsid, stop the app after killing any client. Stage-time attestation (ASM-1413): the k1 source TBox dir is re-digested (kot-corpus-hash/1) against the registered pin, refusing post-freeze drift fail-closed; every payload carries an attestation block the pinned analysis validates.
runner_constraints.kernel_arm: kernel x A1 / kernel x A3 = the REUSED comparator cells from the frozen rules-1 campaign (RC-1 row-hash pinned; regeneration forbidden — review fix 8)
runner_constraints.roles: frozen-design discipline: split out 2026-07-12 by the designer role from the reworked bundled draft (every cross-vendor review fix preserved); the blocking pre-freeze amendment + FREEZE are the coordinator's (register ASM-1407/1417/1419 amendments if not already current, fill the checklist, prereg-freeze.py dry-run first); the GPU run is the runner role's; grading verdict-gen's; audit the cross-vendor auditor's; the analyst writes the readout with the envelope verbatim. NOTHING in this DRAFT licenses any claim.
runner_constraints.stage_discipline: ORDER, enforced: (0) WAIT — rules-1 completes: campaign, readout, ops amendment; rules-1-knull-cert freezes and runs. (1) ONE blocking pre-freeze amendment resolves the freeze_readiness checklist (harness pins, reused_from row shas, parent-analysis pin, cert frozen sha, analysis invocation). (2) coordinator re-verifies every sha and runs prereg-freeze.py --experiment rules-1-knull-hostlift (dry-run first). (3) runner role: knull x A1 and knull x A3 cells ONLY on the pinned finalised harness; kernel cells NEVER regenerated. (4) analysis/rules_1_knull.py with --parent-analysis <pinned parent readout> --hostlift <rows doc> plus the cert-leg payload set per the pinned invocation. (5) verdict-gen + audit; readout carries the envelope verbatim.

title: RULES-1-KNULL-HOSTLIFT (MD-7 / c5 phase-2b, the conditional GPU host-lift leg; SPLIT 2026-07-12 from the bundled rules-1-knull-ablation draft) — NOT FREEZE-READY: BLOCKED ON rules-1 COMPLETING. The parent rules-1 frozen record's own harness_manifest is PINNED-AT-INPUTS (finalised only by its pre-final-run ops amendment), so this record's GPU harness pins are deliberately PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholders to be filled from the FINALISED rules-1 host-lift harness — the cross-vendor review's no-pinnable-runnable-harness finding is resolved by DEFERRAL, never by registering bytes that could diverge from what the parent actually runs. Question: given the pinned parent rules-1 analysis carries /analysis/primary_pass true, does the measured host lift (A3 - A1, R1) SURVIVE substitution of the endorsed kinship TBox by the k1 knull-plain TBox (h1 sign + h2 TOST equivalence => host-level kernel necessity UNSHOWN against this one plain-dictionary compilation channel) or COLLAPSE (=> KERNEL-ADVANTAGE-OVER-THIS-KNULL-COMPILATION at the host level)? Kernel cells (kernel x A1, kernel x A3) REUSED VERBATIM from the frozen rules-1 campaign run-records — never regenerated; only the two knull cells are fresh GPU work. Deflationary outcome gets equal prominence (the knull discipline verbatim).
